name: Customer Feedback Aggregator
description: Collects and analyzes feedback from NPS surveys, support tickets, and reviews into a unified sentiment dashboard.
longDescription: Aggregates customer feedback from multiple sources — NPS survey responses from Typeform, support ticket sentiment from Zendesk, and product reviews from G2. Runs sentiment analysis on all feedback, categorizes by theme, and sends a weekly summary to Slack with overall sentiment trends, top issues, and accounts requiring attention.
